PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?sultan ?sultanLabel ?predecessor ?predecessorLabel ?father ?fatherLabel WHERE {
  ?sultan wdt:P39 wd:Q15315411 .
  ?sultan wdt:P155 ?predecessor .
  ?predecessor wdt:P39 wd:Q15315411 .
  ?sultan wdt:P22 ?father .
  ?sultan rdfs:label ?sultanLabel .
  ?predecessor rdfs:label ?predecessorLabel .
  ?father rdfs:label ?fatherLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?sultanLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?predecessorLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?fatherLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(?father != ?predecessor)
}
ORDER BY ?sultan

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?sultan ?sultanLabel ?predecessor ?predecessorLabel ?father ?fatherLabel
WHERE {
  ?sultan wdt:P39 wd:Q15315411 .
  ?sultan wdt:P155 ?predecessor .
  ?predecessor wdt:P39 wd:Q15315411 .
  ?sultan wdt:P22 ?father .

  ?sultan rdfs:label ?sultanLabel .
  ?predecessor rdfs:label ?predecessorLabel .
  ?father rdfs:label ?fatherLabel .

  FILTER (LANG(?sultanLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (LANG(?predecessorLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (LANG(?fatherLabel) = "en")
  FILTER (?father != ?predecessor)
}
ORDER BY ?sultan
